freshly picked articles from our blog

Flower Delivery from the Pros

Proflowers is a leader in online gift-giving and flower delivery, providing customers around the world with a marketplace of beautiful bouquets, long-lasting plants, and gourmet gift baskets. Shop our collections to find the right gift for any occasion, and give them something unforgettable today. From birthdays to holidays to the moments you want to give a thoughtful gift just because, Proflowers has you covered.

How Much Do Proflowers’ Online Flower Delivery Services Cost?

We offer flower, gift, and plant delivery services to almost 100% of the United States. Within the US, our specialty gifts, flower bouquets, and plants are delivered by local florists in your recipient’s area or shipped by a variety of carriers. Standard shipping or delivery charges start as low as $19.99, though prices may vary by delivery location, shipping time, or calendar day. Delivery is available Monday through Saturday, with Sunday delivery available for select areas. Send flowers with Proflowers today!

Fresh Blooms & Modern Style

From joyful birthday bouquets to elegant sympathy arrangements, we craft beautiful flowers that blend timeless elegance with contemporary flair. Our local florists select the freshest seasonal blooms for designs that make a statement. Whether marking life's big moments or offering comfort, we deliver style without the premium price tag.

Pro Service

Count on same-day delivery and genuine customer care. Our network of trusted local florists ensures your flowers arrive fresh and fabulous, backed by our satisfaction guarantee. Need help? Our team is here 24/7.

Beyond the Bouquet

Explore our curated collection of modern gifts. From sleek bonsai to artisanal gift baskets, we've got options for every taste. Visit our Florapedia for seasonal inspiration and expert tips to keep your blooms looking their best.
